subcodes.first_line: O companion of that renowned and peerless Seer! How fortunate and blessed in character wert thou to be the consort of that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ضجیع آن بصیر شهیر بی نظیر چه خوش طالع و خوش بخت و خوش سیرت بودی که قرین آن
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
